## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Verification

Describe the checks performed. Include screenshots for visual changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and follows `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes.
- [ ] Tests cover changed logic where practical.
- [ ] User-facing documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` are updated when needed.
- [ ] No generated bundles, VSIX files, secrets, or unrelated changes are included.
